keptAsTokenBuilt.activityGauges: Library component doesn't render at inline (48px) size — kept as token-built ellipse arcs
keptAsTokenBuilt.activityFeed: 5 items kept as token-built timeline — replacing with single library component would lose custom content
keptAsTokenBuilt.statCards: No library equivalent — token-built is correct
keptAsTokenBuilt.roadmapTable: Custom layout — Table/Table cell library components don't match this structure
keptAsTokenBuilt.statusBadges: No Badge library component — token-built is correct

remainingFindings.message: Activity gauge library component doesn't work at inline sizes (48px). Token-built ellipse arcs are the correct approach for compact gauge visualizations.
Activity feed items are token-built. A single library Activity feed instance could replace them but would lose custom text content.
Progress bar library components show default 50% value. Percentage can't be overridden via component properties — it's baked into the variant.
14 nav item padding values were hardcoded but are now managed by the library Button component — resolved by component swap.
